_comment: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio Token Plan (Singapore). One key serves both front ends: /v1/messages for Claude Desktop and Claude Code, /v1/responses for Codex. Token Plan keys start with sk-sp-. macOS: ./mac/save-key.sh CLAUDECODEX_DASHSCOPE_API_KEY. Windows: set DASHSCOPE_API_KEY.

upstream._comment: Anthropic-compatible endpoint. Alibaba documents Qwen model ids here.

codex._comment: OpenAI-compatible endpoint, used by the /v1/responses front end. Every Token Plan model is reachable here, so an unlisted model name passes through untouched and 'codex -m glm-5.2' works.
